creator: david@blancolado.com
text:
ports perl-5.8.9.tar.bz2, mysql-5.0.81.tar.gz, and ruby fail to download.

  collaboration# portinstall lighttpd
[Gathering depends for www/lighttpd ..... done]
--->  Installing 'mysql-client-5.0.81' from a port (databases/mysql50-client)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/databases/mysql50-client'
===>  Cleaning for mysql-client-5.0.81
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Extracting for mysql-client-5.0.81
=> MD5 Checksum mismatch for mysql-5.0.81.tar.gz.
=> SHA256 Checksum mismatch for mysql-5.0.81.tar.gz.
===>  Refetch for 1 more times files: mysql-5.0.81.tar.gz mysql-5.0.81.tar.gz 
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
=> mysql-5.0.81.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.fi.muni.cz/pub/mysql/Downloads/MySQL-5.0/.
^Cfetch: transfer interrupted
** Command failed [exit code 2]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portinstall.79456.0 env make
** Fix the problem and try again.
--->  Skipping 'www/lighttpd' because a requisite port 'databases/mysql50-client' failed (specify -k to force)
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
	! databases/mysql50-client	(interrupted by user)
	* www/lighttpd

-----------

  collaboration# portinstall php
** No such package or port: php
  collaboration# portinstall php4
[Gathering depends for lang/php4 ................ done]
--->  Installing 'perl-5.8.9_2' from a port (lang/perl5.8)
--->  Building '/usr/ports/lang/perl5.8'
===>  Cleaning for perl-5.8.9_2
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  Found saved configuration for perl-5.8.9_2
=> BSDPAN-5.8.9_20090303.tar.bz2 doesn't seem to exist in /usr/ports/distfiles/perl.
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.FreeBSD.org/pub/FreeBSD/ports/local-distfiles/skv/.
BSDPAN-5.8.9_20090303.tar.bz2                   0% of 8157  B    0  Bps

Fix: 

Update the URLs where the ports are listed, for some reason the ports above are not in any of the ftp sites that freebsd tries to download it from.
How-To-Repeat: portinstall any of the ports listed above.
